en: You sold Mr. Otterton that Popsicle, right? Do you know him? I know everybody.
ko: Otterton 씨한테 그 아이스크림 팔았죠? 그 분 아세요? 다 알지.

en: The object pronoun him is also commonly reduced to him.
ko: 목적어 대명사 him도 흔히 him으로 축약돼요. Do you want me to talk to him?

en: Do you want me to talk to him? No.
ko: 목적어 대명사 him도 흔히 him으로 축약돼요. Do you want me to talk to him?

en: Now it's your turn. Let's give it a try. Do you know him?
ko: 아뇨. 이제 당신 차례예요. 해봅시다. Do you know him?
